# Strawbirdies — Free Online PDF Editor

> Strawbirdies is a free, browser-based PDF editor. No downloads, no accounts, no fees. Edit PDFs directly in your web browser on any device.

## What is Strawbirdies?

Strawbirdies is a web application that lets anyone edit PDF documents for free. All processing happens in the browser — files are never uploaded to a server, ensuring complete privacy.

## Features

- **Edit existing text**: Click on any text in a PDF and modify it in place
- **Add text**: Place new text anywhere on any page
- **Signatures**: Draw or type signatures and place them on documents
- **Highlight & annotate**: Highlight text areas in multiple colors, add sticky notes
- **Redact**: Permanently black out sensitive content
- **Merge PDFs**: Combine multiple PDF files into one
- **Split PDFs**: Extract specific page ranges into a new document
- **Draw**: Freehand drawing, rectangles, circles, lines, and arrows
- **Insert images**: Add photos and graphics to any page
- **Stamps**: Add preset stamps (APPROVED, DRAFT, CONFIDENTIAL, etc.)
- **Watermarks**: Add text watermarks across all pages
- **Page numbers**: Add customizable page numbering
- **Headers & footers**: Add recurring text to page margins
- **OCR**: Extract text from scanned PDFs using optical character recognition
- **Compress**: Reduce PDF file size
- **Export**: Save individual pages as images
- **Page operations**: Rotate, delete, and reorder pages
- **Remove metadata**: Strip document metadata for privacy

## Key Facts

- **Price**: Free (no premium tiers, no limits)
- **Privacy**: All processing happens in-browser. No files are uploaded to servers.
- **Requirements**: Any modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- **Account**: No sign-up or login required
- **URL**: https://strawbirdies.com
